THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAFEAMERICA CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYNCH, JAMES ANTHONY $1,147.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,252.00, ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT IS STAYED FOR 60 DAYS AFTER JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL. DURING THE STAY THE PARTIES SHALL ATTEMPT TO REACH AGREEMENT CONCERNING HOW JUDGMENT WILL BE PAID. IF NO AGREEMENT IS REACHED DEFENDANT MAY FILE A MOTION FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS OF JUDGEMNT.
